jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Noise
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Noise! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Noise:
Noise is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise!
